nodes.name: Programming & Feasibility
nodes.desc: Owner defines project requirements and validates viability — needs assessment, site analysis, zoning review, pro forma development, and environmental studies. Gate: program approval / authorization to proceed with design. Primarily owner and development team; contractor involved only in CM-at-Risk or design-build.
nodes.derivation: project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: programming, feasibility, schematic design, conceptual design; phase date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities.

nodes.name: Design Development
nodes.desc: Architects and engineers develop the design from concept through construction documents — schematic design (SD), design development (DD), construction documents (CD), code review, structural/MEP engineering, energy modeling, specifications. Gate: bid-ready construction documents issued.
nodes.derivation: project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: design development, DD, construction documents, CD; phase date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities.

nodes.name: Estimating & Budgeting
nodes.desc: Develop cost estimates from conceptual through detailed GMP or hard bid — quantity takeoff, unit pricing, subcontractor pricing, risk contingency, value engineering. Multiple estimate rounds: conceptual (SD), detailed (DD), final (CD). Gate: budget or GMP established.
nodes.derivation: project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: estimating, budget development, budget review; phase date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities.

nodes.name: Permitting & Approvals
nodes.desc: Secure regulatory approvals required before construction — building permits, zoning variances, environmental permits, utility coordination, fire marshal review, DOT permits, stormwater permits. Gate: building permit issued / notice to proceed.
nodes.derivation: project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: permitting, permit, AHJ approval, plan check; phase date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities.

nodes.name: Preconstruction Planning
nodes.desc: GC develops execution strategy before breaking ground — baseline schedule, logistics plan, phasing strategy, safety plan, quality plan, procurement strategy, staffing plan. CM-at-Risk does this during design; design-bid-build GCs do it after award. Gate: baseline schedule accepted.
nodes.derivation: project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: preconstruction planning, GMP, contract execution; phase date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities.

nodes.name: Bidding & Buyout
nodes.desc: Solicit bids from subcontractors and suppliers, level bids, negotiate scope, and award contracts — scope definition, bid solicitation, bid leveling, insurance/bonding verification, contract execution. Buyout typically 60-80% complete before mobilization. Gate: all major subcontracts and POs executed.
nodes.derivation: project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: bidding, buyout, bid review, award; phase date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities.

nodes.name: Submittals & Shop Drawings
nodes.desc: Subcontractors prepare detailed fabrication and product documents for architect/engineer review — submittal preparation, review cycles, resubmittals, product substitution requests. Submittal log is a critical schedule driver. Gate: all critical-path submittals approved.
nodes.derivation: project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: submittal, shop drawing, sample, mock-up; phase date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities.

nodes.name: Fabrication & Long-Lead
nodes.desc: Materials fabricated off-site with delivery schedules established — structural steel (8-16 wks), curtain wall (12-24 wks), elevators (16-30 wks), switchgear (12-20 wks), precast, HVAC equipment, custom casework. Gate: long-lead materials delivered or delivery confirmed.
nodes.derivation: project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: fabrication, long-lead, manufacture, off-site; phase date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities.

nodes.name: Material Ordering & Delivery
nodes.desc: Standard materials ordered and delivery sequenced to match construction schedule — PO issuance, delivery scheduling, staging area planning, just-in-time coordination, material tracking. Material shortages and delivery delays are a top cause of schedule disruption. Gate: materials staged for installation start.
nodes.derivation: project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: material delivery, ordering, expediting; phase date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities.

nodes.name: Site Setup
nodes.desc: Establish temporary facilities and infrastructure to support construction — temporary fencing, construction entrance, trailer placement, temporary utilities (power, water, sanitation), site signage, erosion control, tree protection. First impression for owner and community. Gate: site ready for production work. Duration: 1-3%.
nodes.derivation: Two signals: (a) project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: mobilization, site setup, jobsite trailer, fence; date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities. (b) finance.cost_codes activity WHERE MasterFormat division ~= '01 50 00' — direct costs / commitment activity in this division.

nodes.name: Safety & Environmental Orientation
nodes.desc: Establish safety culture and environmental compliance from day one — site-specific safety orientation, toolbox talks, emergency action plan, hospital route, environmental awareness training, hazard communication. Every worker must complete orientation. Gate: all workers oriented and safety systems active.
nodes.derivation: project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: safety orientation, environmental orientation, kickoff safety; phase date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities.

nodes.name: Demolition & Site Clearing
nodes.desc: Remove existing structures and vegetation to prepare for new construction — building demolition, selective demolition, clearing and grubbing, underground obstruction removal, hazmat abatement if required. Gate: site cleared and ready for earthwork. Duration: 2-5%.
nodes.derivation: Two signals: (a) project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: demolition, demo, clearing, removal; date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities. (b) finance.cost_codes activity WHERE MasterFormat division ~= '02 41 00' — direct costs / commitment activity in this division.

nodes.name: Earthwork
nodes.desc: Excavate and prepare the ground for foundations — bulk excavation, rock removal, shoring/sheeting, dewatering, proof rolling, structural fill, compaction, fine grading. Differing site conditions are the #1 source of construction claims. Gate: subgrade approved for foundation work. Duration: 5-10%.
nodes.derivation: Two signals: (a) project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: earthwork, excavation, grading, mass excavation; date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities. (b) finance.cost_codes activity WHERE MasterFormat division ~= '31 23 00' — direct costs / commitment activity in this division.

nodes.name: Site Utilities
nodes.desc: Install underground infrastructure before building foundations cover access — sanitary sewer, storm drainage, domestic and fire water, gas service, electrical and telecom ductbank, grease interceptors. Must complete before foundation/slab work. Gate: utilities tested and backfilled. Duration: 3-6%.
nodes.derivation: Two signals: (a) project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: site utility, site utilities, water main, sewer install; date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities. (b) finance.cost_codes activity WHERE MasterFormat division ~= '33 00 00' — direct costs / commitment activity in this division.

nodes.name: Foundations
nodes.desc: Construct below-grade structural support — pile driving or drilled shafts, spread footings, grade beams, foundation walls, waterproofing, backfill, underslab plumbing and electrical. Concrete testing (cylinders) is mandatory. Gate: foundations complete and ready for slab/structure. Duration: 5-10%.
nodes.derivation: Two signals: (a) project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: foundation, footings, pile, caisson, foundation walls; date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities. (b) finance.cost_codes activity WHERE MasterFormat division ~= '03 30 00 / 31 62 00' — direct costs / commitment activity in this division.

nodes.name: Slab on Grade
nodes.desc: Ground-supported concrete floor slabs with vapor barriers and joint sealants. Includes reinforcement (rebar, WWF, fiber). Quality depends on subgrade prep and finishing. Trades: concrete workers.
nodes.derivation: Two signals: (a) project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: slab on grade, SOG, ground floor slab; date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities. (b) finance.cost_codes activity WHERE MasterFormat division ~= '03 30 00' — direct costs / commitment activity in this division.

nodes.name: Structural Steel Erection
nodes.desc: Erect the steel frame including columns, beams, girders, metal deck, and shear studs — connection bolting/welding, plumbing and aligning. Tower crane operations dominate logistics. Fall protection is the primary safety concern. Gate: steel topped out (last piece set). Duration: 10-15%.
nodes.derivation: Two signals: (a) project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: steel erection, structural steel, steel frame; date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities. (b) finance.cost_codes activity WHERE MasterFormat division ~= '05 12 00' — direct costs / commitment activity in this division.

nodes.name: Elevated Concrete
nodes.desc: Place concrete on metal deck or formwork for elevated floor slabs — deck prep, rebar/post-tensioning placement, embedded items, concrete pumping, finishing, curing, PT stressing. Follows deck erection floor-by-floor. Gate: floor slabs complete and cured for loading.
nodes.derivation: Two signals: (a) project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: elevated concrete, post-tension, deck pour, suspended slab; date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities. (b) finance.cost_codes activity WHERE MasterFormat division ~= '03 30 00' — direct costs / commitment activity in this division.

nodes.name: Concrete Frame
nodes.desc: For concrete-framed buildings: form and pour columns, beams, and slabs floor-by-floor — formwork erection, rebar placement, embedded items, concrete placement, form stripping, shoring/reshoring, curing. Formwork cycle time drives schedule. Gate: concrete frame topped out. Duration: 10-15%.
nodes.derivation: Two signals: (a) project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: concrete frame, concrete columns, concrete beams; date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities. (b) finance.cost_codes activity WHERE MasterFormat division ~= '03 30 00' — direct costs / commitment activity in this division.

nodes.name: Stairs & Misc Metals
nodes.desc: Installation phase for metal stairs, railings, ladders, and miscellaneous steel items that follow primary structural steel erection.
nodes.derivation: Two signals: (a) project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: stairs, misc metals, railings, handrails; date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities. (b) finance.cost_codes activity WHERE MasterFormat division ~= '05 50 00 / 05 51 00' — direct costs / commitment activity in this division.

nodes.name: Curtain Wall & Glazing
nodes.desc: Install exterior glass and aluminum systems to enclose the building — curtain wall units (unitized or stick-built), windows, storefronts, structural silicone, perimeter sealant. Long-lead fabrication means installation readiness is schedule-critical. Water testing is a major quality milestone. Gate: curtain wall substantially complete. Duration: 5-10%.
nodes.derivation: Two signals: (a) project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: curtain wall, glazing, storefront, window install; date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities. (b) finance.cost_codes activity WHERE MasterFormat division ~= '08 44 00 / 08 80 00' — direct costs / commitment activity in this division.

nodes.name: Masonry & Cladding
nodes.desc: Install opaque exterior wall systems — brick veneer, precast panels, metal panels, backup wall, through-wall flashing, weep systems, control joints. Weather-sensitive: masonry can't be laid below 40°F without protection. Gate: opaque walls substantially complete. Duration: 5-10%.
nodes.derivation: Two signals: (a) project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: masonry, brick, CMU, stone veneer, cladding; date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities. (b) finance.cost_codes activity WHERE MasterFormat division ~= '04 20 00' — direct costs / commitment activity in this division.

nodes.name: Air & Moisture Barrier
nodes.desc: Fluid-applied or sheet membrane air/vapor barriers on exterior sheathing. Performance-critical — failures here cause long-term moisture damage. Third-party inspection is common. Trades: specialty applicators.
nodes.derivation: Two signals: (a) project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: air barrier, moisture barrier, weather barrier, AVB; date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities. (b) finance.cost_codes activity WHERE MasterFormat division ~= '07 25 00' — direct costs / commitment activity in this division.

nodes.name: Roofing
nodes.desc: All roofing materials — membrane, metal, built-up, and accessories. Single-ply membrane (TPO, PVC, EPDM), built-up/modified bitumen (BUR, SBS, APP), metal roofing (standing seam, corrugated, architectural panels), insulation (polyiso, EPS, XPS, cover board), and accessories (fasteners, adhesive, walkway pads, snow guards, drains). Manufacturer warranty submittals are a key deliverable — warranty requirements drive material and installation specifications.
nodes.derivation: Two signals: (a) project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: roofing, roof membrane, roof install; date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities. (b) finance.cost_codes activity WHERE MasterFormat division ~= '07 50 00' — direct costs / commitment activity in this division.

nodes.name: Above-Ceiling Coordination
nodes.desc: Resolve spatial conflicts between MEP systems before installation — 3D coordination / BIM clash detection, routing prioritization, trade coordination meetings, clearance verification. The difference between a smooth MEP install and chaos. Gate: coordination drawings approved. Duration: 1-2% (overlaps with installation).
nodes.derivation: project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: above-ceiling coordination, MEP coordination, BIM coordination; phase date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities.

nodes.name: HVAC Distribution
nodes.desc: All HVAC ductwork, piping, and insulation. Ductwork: sheet metal duct (rectangular, round, oval), flexible duct, duct fittings and accessories (elbows, tees, dampers, turning vanes, access doors), and diffusers/grilles/registers (supply, return, exhaust terminals). Piping: hydronic piping (chilled/hot water, condenser water), refrigerant piping (copper lines, fittings), and mechanical insulation (fiberglass, elastomeric, mineral wool, jacketing). Largest volume of material in above-ceiling spaces.
nodes.derivation: Two signals: (a) project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: HVAC distribution, ductwork install, HVAC pipe rough; date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities. (b) finance.cost_codes activity WHERE MasterFormat division ~= '23 30 00' — direct costs / commitment activity in this division.

nodes.name: Plumbing Rough-In
nodes.desc: Install supply and waste piping — domestic water distribution, sanitary waste and vent, gas piping, pipe insulation, fire stopping at penetrations. Testing is a critical hold point: pressure test for supply, DWV test for waste. Gate: plumbing rough-in complete and tested. Duration: 4-6%.
nodes.derivation: Two signals: (a) project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: plumbing rough, plumbing rough-in, DWV, supply rough; date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities. (b) finance.cost_codes activity WHERE MasterFormat division ~= '22 11 00 / 22 13 00' — direct costs / commitment activity in this division.

nodes.name: Electrical Rough-In
nodes.desc: Install conduit, wire, and power distribution — main conduit and feeder installation, branch circuits, wire pulling, panel and switchgear installation, transformer setting, cable tray, grounding. Permanent power energization is a major milestone. Gate: switchgear energized. Duration: 4-6%.
nodes.derivation: Two signals: (a) project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: electrical rough, conduit rough, branch wiring rough; date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities. (b) finance.cost_codes activity WHERE MasterFormat division ~= '26 27 00' — direct costs / commitment activity in this division.

nodes.name: Fire Protection
nodes.desc: Install sprinkler mains, branches, standpipe risers, and fire pump — main and branch line installation, sprinkler head rough-in, seismic bracing, FDC installation. Sprinkler head layout drives ceiling coordination. Gate: system tested and tagged. Duration: 3-5%.
nodes.derivation: Two signals: (a) project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: fire protection rough, sprinkler rough, sprinkler main install; date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities. (b) finance.cost_codes activity WHERE MasterFormat division ~= '21 13 00' — direct costs / commitment activity in this division.

nodes.name: Low Voltage Rough-In
nodes.desc: Install raceways and cabling for data, security, fire alarm, and AV — conduit and cable tray, backbone and horizontal cabling, fire alarm wiring, security wiring. Often the last trade into the ceiling space. Gate: cabling complete and tested. Duration: 2-4%.
nodes.derivation: Two signals: (a) project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: low voltage rough, data rough, security rough; date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities. (b) finance.cost_codes activity WHERE MasterFormat division ~= '27 10 00' — direct costs / commitment activity in this division.

nodes.name: Metal Stud Framing
nodes.desc: Interior metal stud partitions, soffits, and bulkhead framing with blocking. Layout accuracy drives downstream finish quality. Trades: drywall hangers.
nodes.derivation: Two signals: (a) project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: metal stud framing, wall framing, framing; date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities. (b) finance.cost_codes activity WHERE MasterFormat division ~= '09 22 00' — direct costs / commitment activity in this division.

nodes.name: Drywall
nodes.desc: Hang and finish gypsum board — drywall hanging, taping and finishing, sanding, specialty boards (moisture/abuse/fire-rated), patching around MEP. Above-ceiling inspection must happen BEFORE drywall closes the ceiling. Gate: drywall complete — walls ready for finishes. Duration: 3-5%.
nodes.derivation: Two signals: (a) project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: drywall, gypsum board, sheetrock; date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities. (b) finance.cost_codes activity WHERE MasterFormat division ~= '09 29 00' — direct costs / commitment activity in this division.

nodes.name: Ceiling Grid
nodes.desc: Install suspension system for acoustic ceilings — main tee and cross tee, hanger wire, seismic bracing, grid leveling, access panel framing. Grid installation signals all above-ceiling MEP work must be complete. Gate: grid installed — above-ceiling work must be complete. Duration: 1-2%.
nodes.derivation: Two signals: (a) project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: ceiling grid, ACT install, suspended ceiling grid; date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities. (b) finance.cost_codes activity WHERE MasterFormat division ~= '09 51 00' — direct costs / commitment activity in this division.

nodes.name: Paint & Wall Coatings
nodes.desc: Interior painting, primer, specialty coatings, stain, and clear finishes. Paint/finish is the #1 punch item category universally — touch-ups and color inconsistency dominate closeout. Trades: painters.
nodes.derivation: Two signals: (a) project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: paint, painting, wall coatings; date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities. (b) finance.cost_codes activity WHERE MasterFormat division ~= '09 91 00' — direct costs / commitment activity in this division.

nodes.name: Flooring
nodes.desc: All flooring materials — tile, carpet, resilient, hardwood, stone, and resinous/specialty. Ceramic/porcelain tile (floor and wall tile, mosaics), carpet (broadloom, modular tile), resilient flooring (LVT, VCT, sheet vinyl, rubber, linoleum), hardwood (solid, engineered, prefinished), stone (marble, granite, terrazzo, slate), and resinous/specialty (epoxy, urethane, MMA, polished concrete, stained). Substrate moisture content must meet ASTM F2170 before resilient and wood installation.
nodes.derivation: Two signals: (a) project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: flooring, carpet, tile, VCT; date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities. (b) finance.cost_codes activity WHERE MasterFormat division ~= '09 60 00' — direct costs / commitment activity in this division.

nodes.name: Ceilings
nodes.desc: Install acoustic ceiling tile and specialty ceiling finishes — acoustic tile, specialty ceilings (wood, metal, drywall), ceiling access panels, edge trim. One of the last overhead activities. Gate: ceilings complete. Duration: 1-2%.
nodes.derivation: Two signals: (a) project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: ceilings, ACT tile, ceiling install; date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities. (b) finance.cost_codes activity WHERE MasterFormat division ~= '09 51 00' — direct costs / commitment activity in this division.

nodes.name: Doors & Hardware
nodes.desc: Install door slabs and finish hardware — door hanging, hinges, closers, locksets, pulls, keying, access control coordination, fire-rated door labeling. Top-3 punch item category on every project type. Gate: all doors hung and hardware operational. Duration: 2-3%.
nodes.derivation: Two signals: (a) project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: doors, hardware, door install; date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities. (b) finance.cost_codes activity WHERE MasterFormat division ~= '08 14 00 / 08 71 00' — direct costs / commitment activity in this division.

nodes.name: Casework & Millwork
nodes.desc: Cabinets, countertops, shelving, built-in furniture, and wood trim (base/crown molding). High punch item rate — scratches, chips, alignment, and door adjustment. Trades: carpenters.
nodes.derivation: Two signals: (a) project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: casework, millwork, cabinetry install; date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities. (b) finance.cost_codes activity WHERE MasterFormat division ~= '06 41 00 / 12 30 00' — direct costs / commitment activity in this division.

nodes.name: HVAC Trim & Controls
nodes.desc: Install visible HVAC devices and controls — diffusers, grilles, thermostats, VAV box controls, damper actuators, BAS device installation, final duct connections. Must be complete before TAB. Gate: HVAC devices complete — ready for commissioning. Duration: 1-2%.
nodes.derivation: Two signals: (a) project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: HVAC trim, controls, thermostats, registers; date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities. (b) finance.cost_codes activity WHERE MasterFormat division ~= '23 09 00 / 23 37 00' — direct costs / commitment activity in this division.

nodes.name: Plumbing Fixtures
nodes.desc: Toilets, urinals, sinks, faucets, drinking fountains, and floor drains. High submittal activity (product approvals) and very high punch item rates — plumbing fixtures are a top punch category. Trades: plumbers.
nodes.derivation: Two signals: (a) project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: plumbing fixtures, fixtures install, water closets; date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities. (b) finance.cost_codes activity WHERE MasterFormat division ~= '22 40 00' — direct costs / commitment activity in this division.

nodes.name: Electrical Devices & Lighting
nodes.desc: Install visible electrical devices and light fixtures — outlets, switches, cover plates, light fixtures, exit/emergency lighting, lighting controls, panel labeling. Major visual milestone. Gate: all devices and lighting operational. Duration: 2-3%.
nodes.derivation: Two signals: (a) project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: electrical devices, lighting trim, receptacles, switches; date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities. (b) finance.cost_codes activity WHERE MasterFormat division ~= '26 50 00 / 26 27 26' — direct costs / commitment activity in this division.

nodes.name: Fire Alarm Devices
nodes.desc: Installation of fire alarm notification appliances, pull stations, smoke detectors, and annunciators during the finishes and trim phase.
nodes.derivation: Two signals: (a) project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: fire alarm devices, FA trim, smoke detector install; date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities. (b) finance.cost_codes activity WHERE MasterFormat division ~= '28 31 00' — direct costs / commitment activity in this division.

nodes.name: Low Voltage Devices
nodes.desc: Install visible low voltage devices — data jacks, cameras, card readers, intercoms, paging, AV equipment. Cable labeling and testing required. Gate: devices complete and tested. Duration: 1-2%.
nodes.derivation: Two signals: (a) project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: low voltage devices, jacks trim, AV trim; date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities. (b) finance.cost_codes activity WHERE MasterFormat division ~= '27 15 00' — direct costs / commitment activity in this division.

nodes.name: Pre-Functional Testing
nodes.desc: Verify each system component is properly installed before energizing or flowing — equipment installation verification, valve/damper tag verification, motor rotation checks, control device calibration, breaker verification. Commissioning agent (CxA) typically leads. Gate: all systems verified ready for startup. Duration: 1-2%.
nodes.derivation: project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: pre-functional, prefunctional, PFC, pre-functional testing; phase date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities.

nodes.name: Systems Startup
nodes.desc: Energize and start up individual systems for the first time — electrical energization sequence, boiler/chiller startup, pump/fan startup, fire pump acceptance test, elevator acceptance test, generator load bank test. Manufacturers require authorized rep for startup (warranty condition). Gate: all major systems operational. Duration: 1-2%.
nodes.derivation: project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: startup, system startup, equipment startup; phase date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities.

nodes.name: Testing Adjusting & Balancing
nodes.desc: Air and water system balancing and commissioning verification. Late-project activity — results validate design assumptions. Trades: TAB contractors, commissioning agents.
nodes.derivation: Two signals: (a) project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: TAB, testing adjusting balancing, air balancing; date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities. (b) finance.cost_codes activity WHERE MasterFormat division ~= '23 05 93' — direct costs / commitment activity in this division.

nodes.name: Integrated Systems Testing
nodes.desc: Verify systems work together correctly under various operating conditions — sequence of operations verification, failure mode testing, emergency power transfer, fire alarm integration, smoke control testing, elevator recall, BAS trending. Most complex commissioning phase. Gate: all integrated tests passed. Duration: 1-2%.
nodes.derivation: project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: integrated systems testing, IST, integrated test; phase date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities.

nodes.name: Performance Verification
nodes.desc: Confirm building performs to design intent under actual conditions — energy performance, thermal comfort, acoustics, lighting levels, indoor air quality, envelope performance. Some tests require seasonal conditions (heating vs. cooling season). Gate: performance verified and documented. Duration: 1-2%.
nodes.derivation: project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: performance verification, owner functional, owner test; phase date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities.

nodes.name: Punch List
nodes.desc: Identify and correct remaining deficiencies before owner acceptance — architect punchlist walk, owner punchlist walk, deficiency documentation, trade-by-trade correction, re-inspection, sign-off. Typical project: 500-5,000 punch items. Paint, doors/hardware, and MEP devices consistently top categories. Gate: punch list substantially complete. Duration: 2-4%.
nodes.derivation: project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: punch list, punch, walk-through; phase date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities.

nodes.name: Final Inspections
nodes.desc: Secure regulatory sign-offs required for occupancy — fire marshal inspection, building department final, elevator inspection, health department, certificate of occupancy (CO), temporary CO (TCO). Gate: certificate of occupancy issued. Duration: 1-2%.
nodes.derivation: project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: final inspection, final, certificate of occupancy, CofO; phase date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities.

nodes.name: As-Built Documentation
nodes.desc: Compile record documents reflecting actual constructed conditions — as-built drawing markup, O&M manual compilation, warranty compilation, spare parts and attic stock delivery, equipment data sheets. Contractually required — final payment often withheld until complete. Gate: record documents delivered and accepted. Duration: 1-2%.
nodes.derivation: project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: as-built, record drawings, redlines; phase date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities.

nodes.name: Owner Training
nodes.desc: Train owner's facilities staff on building systems operation and maintenance — HVAC operations, BAS, fire alarm, elevator, security, electrical distribution, plumbing. Often rushed or skipped — leads to operational problems. Gate: training complete and signed off. Duration: <1%.
nodes.derivation: project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: owner training, training, O&M training; phase date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities.

nodes.name: Contract Closeout
nodes.desc: Complete commercial and legal close of all contracts — final change order reconciliation, final pay application, retainage release, lien waiver collection, consent of surety, final accounting, contract close letter. Gate: all contracts formally closed. Duration: 1-3%.
nodes.derivation: project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: contract closeout, project closeout, final acceptance; phase date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities.

nodes.name: Warranty Period
nodes.desc: Contractor responsible for correcting defects discovered after substantial completion — warranty claim response, defect investigation, repair coordination, manufacturer warranty coordination, 11-month warranty walk. General warranty: 1 year; roofing: 10-20 years (manufacturer); structural: varies by jurisdiction. Gate: warranty expired.
nodes.derivation: project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: warranty period, warranty, post-occupancy; phase date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities.

nodes.name: Seasonal Commissioning
nodes.desc: Verify HVAC performance across heating and cooling seasons not available during initial commissioning — heating season verification, cooling season verification, BAS setpoint optimization, energy monitoring review. Gate: all seasonal testing complete (typically 12 months post-occupancy).
nodes.derivation: project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: seasonal commissioning, seasonal cx, deferred cx; phase date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities.

nodes.name: Facility Transition
nodes.desc: Transfer operational knowledge and responsibility from construction team to facilities team — maintenance schedule establishment, spare parts inventory, vendor contact transfer, BAS access transfer, service contract establishment. Gate: facility fully transitioned to operations.
nodes.derivation: project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: facility transition, transition to operations, FM handover; phase date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities.

nodes.name: FEL 1 — Business Planning
nodes.desc: Initial business case and feasibility. Order-of-magnitude cost (-30/+50%). Decision: pursue or kill. CII Front-End Planning stage 1.
nodes.derivation: project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: FEL 1, business planning, conceptual estimate, pursuit phase; phase date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities.

nodes.name: FEL 2 — Conceptual Engineering
nodes.desc: Conceptual scope definition, alternatives analysis, preliminary engineering. Cost estimate (-15/+30%). Authorization to proceed to detailed design. CII FEL stage 2.
nodes.derivation: project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: FEL 2, conceptual engineering, scope definition, schematic; phase date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities.

nodes.name: FEL 3 — Detailed Scope Definition
nodes.desc: Scope frozen, full engineering, definitive cost estimate (-10/+15%). Final investment decision (FID). CII FEL stage 3 — this is where PDRI score is finalized for the gate review.
nodes.derivation: project_management.scheduling_activity WHERE name matches keywords: FEL 3, detailed scope, definitive estimate, FID, gate review; phase date range = MIN(start_date) to MAX(finish_date) of matching activities.
